case_title: GAMARRA, WANDA VS A & A AUTO REPAIR MIKE GOMEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY GAMARRA, WANDA AS TO DEFENDANT A & A AUTO REPAIR   MIKE GOMEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28005, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAMARRA, WANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A & A AUTO REPAIR   MIKE GOMEZ $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $372.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SC 28005 ON 12/16/05. COURTS FINDS THAT IT IS REASONABLE TO ASSESS REASONABLE VALUE ADJUSTMENT CHARGES AGAINST THAT APPELLANT BUT THE CITY TOYOTA EST. IS TOO HIGH.THE RADIATOR IS NOT THE RESPONSIBILITY OF APPELLANT. JOB OF USE WAS CAUSED BY FAILURE OF RESP. TO HAVE REPAIRS DONE.DEFT.EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT A & A AUTO REPAIR   MIKE GOMEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAMARRA, WANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A & A AUTO REPAIR   MIKE GOMEZ $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,022.00, DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT A & A AUTO REPAIR   MIKE GOMEZ
